home.subtitle: What do you want to do today?

login.title: Login
login.username_error: Username must be between 6 and 50 characters.
login.password_error: Password must be between 8 and 100 characters.

register.title: Register
register.email_error: Email must be valid and between 5 and 50 characters.
register.username_error: Username must be between 6 and 50 characters.
register.password_error: Password must be at least 8 characters.

landing.slogan3: AI-assisted education, designed for real learning.
landing.slogan5: Build courses. Share knowledge. Measure progress.
landing.hero_description: The modular education platform that combines courses, reusable exercises, advanced analytics, and artificial intelligence to transform the way you teach and learn.
landing.features_subtitle: A comprehensive platform that enhances every aspect of the educational experience.
landing.feat_courses_text: Courses organized by subjects, modules, and units. Theoretical and practical content with exercises linked to each module.
landing.feat_exercises_text: Each exercise has difficulty, estimated time, tags, and stats. Public or private, with rankings and recommendations.
landing.feat_reuse_text: Create from scratch or reuse existing exercises. The system detects duplicates and encourages collaboration.
landing.feat_social_text: Profiles with achievements, interactions like likes and comments. Discover content by popularity and community.
landing.feat_analytics_text: Metrics per course, exercise, and user. Success rates, common errors, progress, and temporal evolution.
landing.feat_ai_text: AI assistant that generates exercises, exams, and study plans. Always proposed, never automatic.
landing.about_text: Studer is not just about watching content. It's about creating, practicing, sharing, and improving. Our platform lets you build complete educational experiences.
landing.about_brand: Modern, accessible design with light/dark mode
landing.cta_text: Join Studer and experience a new way of teaching and learning. Create courses, share exercises, and let AI help you.
landing.value_text: Studer transforms learning into an active, social, and intelligent process. Create courses, share exercises, analyze results, and let AI help you teach and learn better.
